name: clawmem-claude-code-plugin
description: ClawMem durable memory plugin for Claude Code.

baseUrl.label: API Base URL
baseUrl.help: GitHub-compatible API base URL. Root URLs are normalized to /api/v3 automatically.

defaultRepo.label: Default Repo
defaultRepo.help: Default memory repo for automatic flows and for tool calls that do not specify a repo. Leave empty to accept the auto-provisioned repo.

token.label: API Token
token.help: Override the plugin-managed token. Usually left empty — bootstrap provisions this automatically.

consoleBaseUrl.label: Console Base URL
consoleBaseUrl.help: Override the ClawMem Console URL returned by memory_console. Normally derived from baseUrl.

memoryRecallLimit.label: Memory Recall Limit
memoryRecallLimit.help: Default max number of memories returned by memory_recall when the tool call does not pass `limit`.

memoryAutoRecallLimit.label: Auto Recall Limit
memoryAutoRecallLimit.help: Max number of memories auto-injected before each user prompt via the UserPromptSubmit hook.
